items.name: Dagger
items.rules: +1 Attack when used in pairs. Enemy armour saves at -1 penalty.

items.name: Hammer
items.rules: Concussion: enemy takes -1 to armour save.

items.name: Mace
items.rules: Concussion: enemy takes -1 to armour save.

items.name: Axe
items.rules: Cutting edge: +1 to injury rolls.

items.name: Sword
items.rules: Parry: may force opponent to re-roll one successful hit per turn.

items.name: Club
items.rules: Concussion: enemy takes -1 to armour save.

items.name: Spear
items.rules: Strike first on the charge. +1 Strength on the charge.

items.name: Halberd
items.rules: +1 Strength. Two-handed: cannot use with shield.

items.name: Double-Handed Weapon
items.rules: +2 Strength. Two-handed. Strikes last.

items.name: Flail
items.rules: +2 Strength in first turn of combat. Two-handed.

items.name: Morning Star
items.rules: +1 Strength in first turn of combat.

items.name: Steel Whip
items.rules: Cannot be parried. Counts as two-handed.

items.name: Fighting Claws (Pair)
items.rules: +1 Attack. +1 Initiative for climbing tests. Parry with re-roll (like sword + buckler). Cannot use any other weapons in the battle.

items.name: Weeping Blades (Pair)
items.rules: +1 Attack. Permanently coated in black lotus (on a 6 to wound, automatic wound with no armour save). No additional poison may be applied. Parry.

items.name: Dark Elf Blade
items.rules: Upgrades a sword or dagger. Parry as sword, +1 to hit in first round of combat. Heroes only.

items.name: Beastlash
items.rules: Whip weapon. Cannot be parried. Beastmaster only.

items.name: Dwarf Axe
items.rules: Extra -1 save modifier. May parry like a sword. Rare 8.

items.name: Gromril Weapon
items.rules: 3x the cost of the base weapon. +1 to hit. Unbreakable.

items.name: Ball and Chain
items.rules: No armour saves. D3 wounds. Moves 2D6" randomly. Goblin only, requires Mad Cap Mushrooms.

items.name: Squig Prodder
items.rules: Counts as spear. Extends Squig control range to 12". Goblin only.

items.name: Plague Censer
items.rules: +2 Strength. All models within 3" (friend and foe) suffer S1 hit at start of each combat phase. Two-handed. Bearer takes D6 S1 hits per turn unless has Censer Bearer skill.

items.name: Disease Dagger
items.rules: On a wound roll of 6, the enemy must pass a Toughness test or suffer an additional wound (no armour save).

items.name: Trident
items.rules: Strike first on the charge. +1 to disarm attempts.

items.name: Pike
items.rules: +1 Strength. Strike first when charged. Two-handed.

items.name: Rapier
items.rules: Parry. +1 to hit when fighting with a rapier and a dagger or buckler.

items.name: Serpent Staff
items.rules: On a wound roll of 6, the enemy must pass a Toughness test or take an additional D3 wounds (no armour save). Liche Priest only.

items.name: Short Bow
items.rules: None.

items.name: Bow
items.rules: None.

items.name: Long Bow
items.rules: None.

items.name: Elf Bow
items.rules: Ignores movement penalty.

items.name: Crossbow
items.rules: Move or fire.

items.name: Pistol
items.rules: Armour save -2. Can be used in close combat.

items.name: Duelling Pistol
items.rules: Armour save -2. +1 to hit. Can be used in close combat.

items.name: Handgun
items.rules: Armour save -1. Move or fire.

items.name: Blunderbuss
items.rules: Flame template. Move or fire.

items.name: Sling
items.rules: May fire twice at half range.

items.name: Throwing Knife
items.rules: Thrown weapon.

items.name: Throwing Star
items.rules: Thrown weapon. Can throw 2 per turn.

items.name: Repeater Crossbow
items.rules: May fire twice per turn. Move or fire.

items.name: Crossbow Pistol
items.rules: May be used in close combat. No move/fire penalty.

items.name: Javelins
items.rules: Thrown weapon. +1 Strength on the charge when used as close combat weapon.

items.name: Asp Arrows
items.rules: Used with bows. On a wound roll of 6, target takes D3 additional wounds (no armour save). One use per battle. Rare 9.

items.name: Nehekharan Javelins
items.rules: Thrown weapon. +1 to hit. May be used as close combat weapon on charge.

items.name: Blowpipe
items.rules: Poison: on a 6 to hit, target is automatically wounded. Cannot cause critical hits. Positive armour save modifier. Stealthy: can fire while hidden without revealing position.

items.name: Warplock Pistol
items.rules: -3 armour save modifier. Takes a whole turn to reload (fire every other turn). 70gc for a brace. Can be used in close combat (+1 Attack at S5 with -3 save modifier).

items.name: Light Armour
items.rules: None.

items.name: Heavy Armour
items.rules: -1 Movement. -1 Initiative.

items.name: Shield
items.rules: Combined with other armour. Cannot use with two-handed weapons.

items.name: Buckler
items.rules: Parry in close combat.

items.name: Helmet
items.rules: Avoid being stunned on a 4+.

items.name: Gromril Armour
items.rules: No movement penalty. Rare 11.

items.name: Ithilmar Armour
items.rules: No movement penalty. Rare 11.

items.name: Sea Dragon Cloak
items.rules: Combined with other armour. Scaly skin gives 5+ armour save vs shooting.

items.name: Elven Cloak
items.rules: Enemy suffers -1 to hit when shooting at the wearer. Rare 12.

items.name: Gromril Armour
items.rules: Heavy armour made of gromril. No movement penalty. Dwarfs only.

items.name: Rope & Hook
items.rules: +1 to climbing tests.

items.name: Torch
items.rules: Provides light. Causes fear in animals.

items.name: Lantern
items.rules: Extended light radius.

items.name: Holy Water
items.rules: Thrown weapon. S2. Causes D3 wounds vs Undead/Possessed. One use.

items.name: Lucky Charm
items.rules: Ignore first hit in a battle. One use.

items.name: Holy Relic
items.rules: +1 to Rout tests. Rare 8.

items.name: Rabbit's Foot
items.rules: +1 to first exploration roll.

items.name: Garlic
items.rules: Vampires must pass Ld test to charge.

items.name: Healing Herbs
items.rules: Re-roll one recovery roll per battle. One use. Rare 8.

items.name: Cathayan Silk Clothes
items.rules: -1 to enemy hit rolls in first round of combat. Rare 9.

items.name: Superior Blackpowder
items.rules: +1 Strength for blackpowder weapons. Rare 11.

items.name: Bugman's Ale
items.rules: Immune to Fear for one battle. One use. Rare 9.

items.name: Tome of Magic
items.rules: +1 to casting rolls. Rare 12.

items.name: Horse
items.rules: M8. +2" charge range. Rare 8.

items.name: War Dog
items.rules: WS3 S3 T3 W1 I4 A1. Ld5.

items.name: Dark Venom
items.rules: One weapon coated with poison. First wound caused in melee forces enemy to roll on injury chart. One use. Heroes only.

items.name: Elven Runestones
items.rules: Mage can attempt to dispel spells (roll against spell Difficulty). Rare 11.

items.name: Elven Wine
items.rules: Warband is immune to Fear for entire battle. One use. Rare 10.

items.name: Standard of Nagarythe
items.rules: Second rallying point: re-roll failed Ld tests within 12". If captured, all gain Hatred and may not Rout. Requires one free hand. Rare 9.

items.name: War Horn of Nagarythe
items.rules: Same as War Horn. Rare 6.

items.name: Familiar
items.rules: Allows wizard to re-roll one failed casting roll per turn. Spell-users only. Rare 8.

items.name: Hunting Arrows
items.rules: +1 to all Injury rolls when using a bow. Rare 8.

items.name: Hunting Rifle
items.rules: Range 48", S4. Move or Fire. Prepare Shot (fire every other turn). Pick Target. -2 save modifier. Rare 11.

items.name: Bear-Claw Necklace
items.rules: Wearer becomes subject to Frenzy. Rare 9.

items.name: Vodka
items.rules: +1 Leadership (max 10) for entire warband for one battle. Each model must test T or suffer -1 Initiative. One use. Rare 8.

items.name: Mad Cap Mushrooms
items.rules: Subject to Frenzy for the battle. After battle, roll D6: on 1, model becomes permanently Stupid. Rare 9.
